description: Style Note Bright blue and grey ballet style shoe with updated design details. Aggressive lugs make this a comfort junkie's favourite shoe! Product Description Woven elasticated upper with a midfoot strap A synthetic pull tab at the heel Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guard Flexible rubber outsole with circular nubs all over Material and Care Synthetic, fabric Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
